prompt: A dark anime gothic portrait of a {argument name="character type" default="young woman"} shown from the chest up, centered in the frame, with long layered {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair in messy twin tails and loose strands falling over the shoulders. She wears two large black ribbon-and-lace hair ornaments, a black gothic dress with voluminous sleeves and delicate lace trim, black lace fingerless gloves, and a black leather choker with a buckle. Around her neck are 2 layered silver chain necklaces, one ending in a prominent cross pendant. Both hands are raised near her face making peace signs, one on each side, with black painted nails and a slightly playful, edgy pose. The background is a rich blood-red gradient with a dark, moody atmosphere, decorated with 5 visible black roses on thorny stems around the figure and dripping black shapes along the top edge, creating a dramatic gothic horror aesthetic. Use high-detail anime illustration, sharp linework, soft dramatic shading, glossy black fabrics, pale skin, strong red-and-black contrast, symmetrical composition, close-up framing, and an elegant but ominous mood.
translatedPrompt: 一张暗黑动漫风格的哥特肖像，主角为 {argument name="character type" default="年轻女性"}，半身构图，居中展示。她留着长长的多层次 {argument name="hair color" default="银白色"} 凌乱双马尾，发丝自然垂落在肩头。她佩戴着两个巨大的黑色丝带蕾丝发饰，身穿带有蓬松袖口和精致蕾丝花边的黑色哥特裙，戴着黑色蕾丝露指手套，以及带有金属扣的黑色皮质颈圈。颈部叠戴两条银色链条项链，其中一条挂着醒目的十字架吊坠。双手举在脸颊两侧比出剪刀手，指甲涂成黑色，姿态俏皮又不失酷感。背景为浓郁的血红色渐变，营造出阴郁的氛围，人物周围装饰着 5 朵带刺的黑玫瑰，顶部边缘有黑色滴落状图形，呈现出极具戏剧性的哥特恐怖美学。采用高细节动漫插画风格，线条锐利，阴影柔和且富有戏剧性，强调黑色织物的光泽感、苍白的肤色以及强烈的红黑对比，构图对称，近景取景，整体氛围优雅而诡谲。

breakdown.creativeCore: 哥特风动漫少女与黑玫瑰：此提示词可生成一张极具张力的红黑配色哥特风动漫肖像，非常适合用于角色设计、头像或暗黑幻想插画构思。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, close-up, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
